title: ophrys × macrostachys subsp. liceana
intro: Ophrys × macrostachys subsp. liceana is a hybrid orchid, a subspecies of the Ophrys macrostachys, commonly known as the bee orchid, and is found in the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × macrostachys subsp. liceana include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
